name: Sweet Onion Pepper Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the sweet onions and peppers finely.
2. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
3. Slowly bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
4. Continue cooking until slightly thickened.
5. Pour the relish into hot, sterile jars, filling them up to within 1/2 inch of the top.
6. Seal the jars tightly.
7. Makes 3 to 4 pints.
